text: The clean, structured architecture and the presence of safety equipment in the first space give me a sense of order but also sterility. As I move into the vibrant and conceptually rich exhibition area, surrounded by ideas about research and development, my mind awakens. I feel curious, almost electrified by the colorful display of human creativity and the ongoing dialogue about the coexistence of humans and machines. Here, I exist at the intersection of logic and imagination—a stimulating, yet slightly disorienting place to be.
